title: client_task: SSE StateChange loop
description:
## Why
Real-time updates require processing SSE events from the server.

## What
- Open EventSource stream via JmapChatClient::subscribe_events()
- On StateChange for Message: call Message/changes then Message/get for new ids, send NewMessage / updated events
- On StateChange for Chat: call Chat/changes + Chat/get, send ChatUpdated
- On StateChange for ChatContact: refresh contacts
- On cannotCalculateChanges: fall back to full /get
- Exponential backoff on disconnect (1s, 2s, 4s … cap 60s), then reconnect
- Forward typing and presence SSE events as AppEvent
close_reason: Superseded; replaced by issues under jmap-chat-tui-s2e (egui) and new TUI epic
